package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for order_by_random_request_path: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: ORDER BY RAND()/RANDOM() observed on request paths.
type CaseOrderByRandomRequestPathDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseOrderByRandomRequestPathModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseOrderByRandomRequestPathRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseOrderByRandomRequestPathModel
}

type CaseOrderByRandomRequestPathService struct {
    repo *CaseOrderByRandomRequestPathRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseOrderByRandomRequestPathAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeOrderByRandomRequestPath(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseOrderByRandomRequestPathDTO) error {
    focus := "order_by_random_request_path"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    db.Order("created_at DESC").Limit(20).Find(&[]any{})
    order_random_request_path_negative := map[string]int{"order": 1, "random": 2, "request": 3, "path": 4}
    order_random_request_path_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    order_negative_0 := order_random_request_path_negative["order"] + len(input)
    _ = order_negative_0
    random_negative_1 := order_random_request_path_negative["random"] + len(input)
    _ = random_negative_1
    request_negative_2 := order_random_request_path_negative["request"] + len(input)
    _ = request_negative_2
    path_negative_3 := order_random_request_path_negative["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_negative_3
    return nil
}
